title: chore(deps): update dependency sinon to v4.5.0
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [sinon](https://github.com/sinonjs/sinon) from `v4.4.2` to `v4.5.0`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v4.5.0`](https://github.com/sinonjs/sinon/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​450--2018-03-30)
[Compare Source](https://github.com/sinonjs/sinon/compare/4a7d56a808fb28c153c552b7d32ffa4cf6f1ef99...v4.5.0)
==================

  * Add .lastArg and .callback to spy call

---
